description_long: This object is a robust, military-style shotgun with a long, cylindrical barrel and a prominent heat shield running along its top. The receiver is boxy and metallic, featuring a visible ammunition belt feeding into the side, suggesting a high-capacity, rapid-fire design. The stock is skeletal and straight, constructed from a dark, durable material, and the grip is ergonomic with a slight angle for better handling. The fore-end includes a bipod attachment, enhancing stability for precision shooting. The overall finish is matte with a mix of dark brown, black, and olive drab tones, giving it a rugged, utilitarian appearance. The trigger guard is elongated and slightly squared, providing ample space for gloved fingers.
description: A rugged, military-style shotgun with a long barrel, boxy receiver, visible ammo belt, and skeletal stock, finished in dark matte tones.
description_view_0: Front view showing the circular muzzle, heat shield, and the side-fed ammunition belt protruding to the left.
description_view_1: Side profile highlighting the full length of the barrel, the boxy receiver, bipod, and the skeletal stock.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the end of the stock, the back of the receiver, and the alignment of the barrel.
description_view_3: Opposite side profile showing the ammunition belt feed, bipod, and the overall length of the shotgun.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel with a long, vented heat shield on top
attribute_trigger_guard_design: elongated, squared trigger guard with ample space and reinforced edges
